title: praxis #4234
definition:
1) a doing, a mode of acting, a deal, a transaction
    1a) the doings of the apostles
    1b) in a bad sense, wicked deed, crime, wicked doings
        (our practices i.e. trickery)
 2) a thing to be done, business
nasbUsage:

    1a) the doings of the apostles
    1b) in a bad sense, wicked deed, crime, wicked doings

 2) a thing to be done, business
